earnings_calendar.reaction: Board meeting for fund raising today

news_headlines.title: IT Stocks Rebound: Nifty IT surges over 3% led by TCS and Infosys value buying
Crude Oil prices slide 1.5% on US-Iran ceasefire deal hopes
FII selling pressure continues with Rs 8,362 Cr outflow; DIIs cushion with Rs 9,589 Cr buy
India-US Trade Negotiations set for early June; optimism drives market momentum
Nifty snaps 4-day losing streak to close at 23,483 as Strait of Hormuz tensions ease

ai_plan.niftyLevel: Watch 23,400 closely — if Nifty holds above 23,400 during the first 15 minutes, look for long setups targeting 23,550 and 23,620. If it breaks below 23,380, wait for a lower base support near 23,250.
ai_plan.optionsPlay: Buy Nifty 23500 CE (Current Weekly Expiry) at ₹110 if Nifty spot trades above 23,420 after 9:20 AM. Stop Loss at ₹75. Target at ₹170 / ₹210.
ai_plan.avoid: Avoid taking heavy long positions in PSU Banks and Power Grid today, as FII selling remains concentrated in these cyclical heavyweights. Avoid entering positions prior to the 9:20 AM confirmation check.
ai_plan.openingExpectation: Nifty is expected to open with a mild gap-up near ₹23,510 - ₹23,530, tracking positive GIFT Nifty and a strong recovery in US futures. Expect an initial volatile pullback, followed by bullish momentum led by the IT sector.
ai_plan.intraday_bias: First 15 min likely to be highly volatile due to initial gap-up selling, followed by trending bullish momentum as the Nifty IT index finds support at its 50-EMA.
